title: The Full 2026 Oscars Winners List Is Here
text: The 98th Academy Awards ceremony featured a competitive race between "One Battle After Another" and "Sinners" for Best Picture. Paul Thomas Anderson's politically charged thriller ultimately prevailed, securing six awards total including Best Picture, Best Director, Best Casting, Best Adapted Screenplay, Best Supporting Actor, and Best Editing. Anderson's win marked his first Oscar victories despite accumulating 14 nominations throughout his career. The film featured Leonardo DiCaprio and Sean Penn, with Penn winning Best Supporting Actor. The horror-musical "Sinners" directed by Ryan Coogler also performed strongly, claiming four awards including Best Actor (Michael B. Jordan), Best Original Screenplay, Best Cinematography, and Best Original Score. Jessie Buckley won Best Actress for "Hamnet," while Guillermo del Toro's "Frankenstein" dominated the crafts categories with wins in Production Design, Makeup and Hairstyling, and Costume Design.
